# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

{"change_summary":"Completed the pending `ralph pr open` remediation in `src/contexts/bead_workflow/pr_open.rs`: convergence history is now scoped to the latest/current run id so older run journal events cannot leak into commit messages or PR bodies, and the PR diff/commit path handling now aligns committed paths with the rendered review-scope file set. The review-scope filter now includes legitimate product paths beyond the original `src/`, `tests/`, `docs/`, and root-config whitelist, such as `.github/`, `scripts/`, `templates/`, common root docs, and common code/config extensions, while still excluding orchestration and generated metadata such as `.ralph-burning/`, `.beads/`, `.git/`, `target/`, and `node_modules/`. Added regression coverage for mixed old/current run convergence events and reviewable paths outside the original whitelist, and updated the mockable PR tool port to record and commit only the filtered path set.","outstanding_risks":[],"steps":[{"description":"Inspected t
